# Realsee Skills

Purpose: Source-available Realsee agent Skill distribution for users and agent runtimes.
Current release line: Argus Skill 2.0.0; legacy square/single-GLB workflows remain pinned at v1.0.2.
Agent priority: inspect this file, then README.md, docs/usage.md, AGENTS.md, and .agents/skills/argus/SKILL.md.
Languages: English default; Simplified Chinese in README.zh-CN.md, docs/zh-CN/, and same-directory *.zh-CN.md pairs.

Primary Skill:
- ID: argus
- State: preview until real global and cn E2E gates pass
- Definition: .agents/skills/argus/SKILL.md
- English docs: .agents/skills/argus/README.md
- Chinese docs: .agents/skills/argus/README.zh-CN.md
- CLI: .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs
- Public Gateway contract: .agents/skills/argus/references/argus-gateway-openapi.json
- Algorithm I/O: .agents/skills/argus/references/algorithm-io.md and .agents/skills/argus/references/algorithm-io.zh-CN.md
- Algorithm manifest schema: .agents/skills/argus/references/argus-output.schema.json
- Migration: .agents/skills/argus/references/migration-v2.md and .agents/skills/argus/references/migration-v2.zh-CN.md

Capability:
- Input: 1–99 JPEG/PNG/WebP RGB8 equirectangular panoramas, exact width == 2 * height.
- Input modes: repeat --image or pass one mutually exclusive --zip.
- Packaging: safe validation plus deterministic normalized streaming ZIP.
- Output: retained output.zip, EXR depth maps in meters, merged GLB, poses, optional intrinsics, output.json, and local result.json index.
- Remote lifecycle: task_status queued | processing | succeeded | failed.
- Algorithm result: result_status success | partial | error; partial exits 0 with warning and non-empty missing_ids.
- No detached poller, old VGGT fallback, square input, legacy preview, or 1.x workspace migration.

Explicit CLI lifecycle:
- Start images: node .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs start --image /absolute/a.jpg --image /absolute/b.webp --workspace /absolute/workspace-root --yes --json
- Start ZIP: node .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs start --zip /absolute/input.zip --workspace /absolute/workspace-root --yes --json
- Status once: node .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs status --workspace /absolute/workspace-root/<run-dir> --json
- Collect terminal result: node .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs collect --workspace /absolute/workspace-root/<run-dir> --json

Credential contract:
- Required: REALSEE_APP_KEY, REALSEE_APP_SECRET, REALSEE_REGION.
- Regions: global -> app-gateway.realsee.ai; cn -> app-gateway.realsee.cn.
- Existing precedence: inherited shell env, then agent-loaded ~/.realsee/credentials, then one-field-per-turn Q&A.
- Never print values or pass them as recorded command arguments.
- state.json/result.json never store credentials, upload tokens, presigned URLs, or raw provider errors.

Gateway adapter:
- POST /auth/access_token
- GET /open/v1/argus/file/token
- POST /open/v1/argus/task/submit (never automatically retried)
- GET /open/v1/argus/task/info
- Bases remain global and cn.

Install commands:
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus --agent claude-code
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus --agent codex
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus --agent '*'
- npx skills add . --skill argus
- npm run install:codex-skills

Repository map:
- User docs: README.md and README.zh-CN.md
- Agent rules: AGENTS.md and AGENTS.zh-CN.md
- Architecture: ARCHITECTURE.md and ARCHITECTURE.zh-CN.md
- Support: SUPPORT.md and SUPPORT.zh-CN.md
- Install overview: docs/install-guides.md and docs/zh-CN/install-guides.md
- Claude Code: docs/claude-plugin.md and docs/zh-CN/claude-plugin.md
- Codex: docs/codex.md and docs/zh-CN/codex.md
- Usage: docs/usage.md and docs/zh-CN/usage.md
- Public distribution: docs/public-distribution.md and docs/zh-CN/public-distribution.md
- Generated Claude plugin: plugins/realsee-skills/
- Generated CN-only Arkclaw copy: arkclaw/argus/
- Marketplace: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
- Release metadata: release-channel.json

Common maintenance commands:
- npm run setup:local
- npm run doctor
- npm run smoke
- npm run validate:ai
- npm run validate:docs
- npm run validate:skills
- npm run rebuild
- npm run check:claude-sync
- npm run check:arkclaw-sync
- npm run test:skill
- npm run ci

Safety:
- Every real Argus run is a remote upload and requires user consent.
- Do not commit secrets, generated credentials, account identifiers, private URLs, output.zip, extracted artifacts, .env files, or temporary workspaces.
- Edit .agents/skills/argus/; generated Claude and Arkclaw copies are rebuilt from canonical source.
- Do not add internal evidence, private source references, live scorecards, internal process docs, or local absolute paths.
